description.ko: 에코-0가 포착한 음파를 시각적으로 탐구한 작업으로, 음향 데이터가 빛나는 기하학적 건축물과 유동적인 운동 패턴으로 변환되는 과정을 보여줍니다.
description.en: A visual exploration of sound waves captured by ECHO-0, where acoustic data transforms into luminous geometric architecture and fluid kinetic patterns.

prompt: Cinematic 3D visualization of sound frequencies, ECHO-0 core emitting pulse waves, iridescent ribbons of light weaving through a dark minimalist void, holographic data streams, 8k resolution, ethereal atmosphere, parametric design, golden ratio proportions, glowing acoustic ripples reflecting on a polished obsidian floor.
